text: From this vantage point, I feel a sense of curiosity and slight disorientation. I seem to be peeking from behind or within some barrier, observing a swirl of cables and screens, a chaos of modern objects. The world appears fragmented and enigmatic, drawing me to question what lies just out of clear sight. There is a strangely comforting sense of anonymity here, as if I am hidden from the busyness beyond.
